deprecated_comments.description: Use WASMLoader() for safe mod execution in sandboxed environments.
Unsafe for untrusted mods. Use WASM mods via WASMLoader() instead.
Use ApplyToEntity instead to specify the target entity and ECS world.
Use System.Update instead to process effects within the ECS.

note_comments.description: We can't render text without adding a text rendering system
generates a single melodic note with harmonics.
with multiple harmonics to PCM data.
This is a minimal list. Production would use localized word lists.
This would require modifying CraftingMenu to have an AddRecipe method
